name: SCM Database Privileged Operation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g, Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: SCM Database Privileged Operation
SIGMA Description: Detects non-system users performing privileged operation os the SCM database

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4674 AND "Object Type"='SC_MANAGER OBJECT' AND "Object Name"='servicesactive' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%setakeownershipprivilege%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x3e4%' AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%:\windows\system32\services.exe'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SCM Database Privileged Operation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4674 AND "Object Type"='SC_MANAGER OBJECT' AND "Object Name"='servicesactive' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%setakeownershipprivilege%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x3e4%' AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%:\windows\system32\services.exe'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: SCM Database Privileged Operation

This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
